title: TooLAME
summary: TooLAME is a free software MPEG-1 Layer II (MP2) audio encoder written primarily by Mike Cheng. While there are many MP2 encoders, TooLAME is well-known and widely used for its particularly high audio quality. It has been unmaintained since 2003, but is directly succeeded by the TwoLAME code fork. The name TooLAME is a play on LAME and Layer II.
extract: TooLAME is a free software MPEG-1 Layer II (MP2) audio encoder written primarily by Mike Cheng.  While there are many MP2 encoders, TooLAME is well-known and widely used for its particularly high audio quality.  It has been unmaintained since 2003, but is directly succeeded by the TwoLAME code fork (the latest version, TwoLAME 0.4.0, was released October 11, 2019).  The name TooLAME is a play on LAME and Layer II.
